top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element != 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'F' OR a.element != 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) 
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND a.element = 'F'
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a2.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a2 
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'Se', 'As')
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) 
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND a.element = 'F'
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a2.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a2 
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'Se', 'As')
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'F'
    ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As'
